svg.title: OODA framework for AI visual inspection system
svg.desc: Four-phase OODA analysis: Observe identifies current gaps, Orient reframes the system positioning, Decide establishes the five-layer business architecture, Act defines concrete metrics and demo strategy

g.text: O1 · Observe — 当前系统的真实处境
O2 · Orient — 重新定位系统身份
业务决策系统 · 数据闭环
D · Decide — 五层业务架构设计
A · Act — 三维指标体系与演示策略
② 轻微缺陷→B级→人工复核
③ 严重缺陷→NG→自动通知
④ 驾驶舱→今日统计+TOP缺陷
